<<Writing Prompts for the Workshop>>

Emily organizes groups of six. Each group gets three prompts. The library provides writing materials for all.

* * *

The workshop includes creative activities. The library has extra books for inspiration. Each group receives additional prompts if needed.

* * * 

Emily prepares initial prompts for each group. The library ensures all resources are available. The committee reviews the plan before the session.

The committee reviews the plan before the session. The library has books for all participants. Emily needs to prepare 24 groups times 3 prompts equals 72 initial prompts. Then, 10 extra prompts divided by 6 groups equals 1.66, so 2 extra prompts per group. Total prompts are 72 plus 10 equals 82. The library supports the workshop with books and resources. The END.
